summary: Anonymous user Free Game of the Day archive - Feed Select

steps.action: WHEN the user selects the game tile for an archived Free Game of the Day
steps.result:
THEN the following title text is displayed, "Free Game of the Day" (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND the following description text is displayed, "Login or register with a free MLB account to watch the free game of the day." (subject to change via Content Restrictions)
AND the following title text is displayed, "Full Game Access"
AND a [Subscribe] button is displayed below "Full Game Access"
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select one of the feed buttons
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page after pressing the "back" button on the controller
